title: bupleurum subnivale
intro: Bupleurum subnivale, also known as Snow Umbel or Subalpine Hare's Ear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum subnivale include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving liver function. Bupleurum subnivale is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
